property.name: buttonClass
property.label: CSS Class (optional)
property.description: Choose between brand, action, or subtle style

property.name: autoLaunch
property.label: Auto Launch Flow?
property.description: Automatically launch the flow on load

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon (optional)
property.description: Enter a standard SFDC icon name (e.g. utility:forward)

property.name: buttonStyle
property.label: CSS Class For button (optional)
property.description: Choose between brand, action, or subtle style

property.name: buttonClass
property.label: CSS Class For button (optional)
property.description: Choose between brand, action, or subtle style

property.name: autoLaunch
property.label: Auto Launch Flow?
property.description: Automatically launch the flow on load

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon (optional)
property.description: Enter a standard SFDC icon name (e.g. utility:forward)

property.name: alignment
property.label: Button Alignment
property.description: Align the button: left, center, or right

property.name: modalSize
property.label: Modal Size
property.description: Size of the modal: small, medium, or large

property.name: buttonSize
property.label: Button Size
property.description: Choose button size: small, medium, or big

property.name: Input_Text_Var
property.label: Input_Text_Var
property.description: Fill to transfer the value to a variable with the same name in the subflow

property.name: Input_Bool_Var
property.label: Input_Bool_Var
property.description: Fill to transfer the value to a variable with the same name in the subflow

property.name: nameInput
property.label: name
property.description: Fill to transfer the value to a variable with the same name in the subflow
